# Monitored-line (sensor) placements for the four systems.
# 10 random placements per network; entries are branch indices
# (see branch_reference/<network>_branches.csv for from/to bus and switch type).
# Each vector is ready to paste as cfg.pmu in the experiment driver.

# 33-node : 10 random placements, 5 sensors each (13.5% of 37 branches)
Set 01:  cfg.pmu = [6 13 16 32 33];
Set 02:  cfg.pmu = [10 18 24 27 33];
Set 03:  cfg.pmu = [1 2 17 27 29];
Set 04:  cfg.pmu = [9 11 22 32 37];
Set 05:  cfg.pmu = [5 17 25 31 36];
Set 06:  cfg.pmu = [1 6 10 19 36];
Set 07:  cfg.pmu = [3 12 18 30 36];
Set 08:  cfg.pmu = [11 13 17 27 32];
Set 09:  cfg.pmu = [16 18 29 31 35];
Set 10:  cfg.pmu = [4 10 12 18 32];

# 69-node : 10 random placements, 10 sensors each (13.7% of 73 branches)
Set 01:  cfg.pmu = [10 18 27 32 33 45 52 63 64 67];
Set 02:  cfg.pmu = [1 3 16 20 34 41 54 58 61 68];
Set 03:  cfg.pmu = [1 9 11 19 34 35 49 64 65 72];
Set 04:  cfg.pmu = [5 20 24 26 32 37 51 60 62 72];
Set 05:  cfg.pmu = [7 19 23 34 36 57 58 63 68 69];
Set 06:  cfg.pmu = [6 8 13 22 29 48 63 64 65 72];
Set 07:  cfg.pmu = [12 20 27 29 44 47 49 66 68 69];
Set 08:  cfg.pmu = [2 7 16 22 28 48 51 55 56 73];
Set 09:  cfg.pmu = [4 7 9 10 14 17 25 34 63 67];
Set 10:  cfg.pmu = [3 9 11 12 18 31 41 46 48 52];

# 118-node : 10 random placements, 15 sensors each (11.4% of 132 branches)
Set 01:  cfg.pmu = [1 6 18 33 50 56 58 62 83 92 97 99 117 120 122];
Set 02:  cfg.pmu = [2 16 19 32 34 39 59 63 81 85 113 116 119 125 132];
Set 03:  cfg.pmu = [9 37 43 49 57 60 61 67 96 97 107 114 115 129 130];
Set 04:  cfg.pmu = [10 13 14 23 37 39 45 53 67 83 112 114 115 117 126];
Set 05:  cfg.pmu = [23 35 47 49 55 80 81 83 86 88 93 123 126 128 129];
Set 06:  cfg.pmu = [4 7 12 13 17 18 25 29 31 43 44 60 109 121 130];
Set 07:  cfg.pmu = [4 12 16 20 23 34 45 57 77 88 95 106 124 129 132];
Set 08:  cfg.pmu = [15 17 23 27 44 47 48 64 72 77 107 114 126 129 130];
Set 09:  cfg.pmu = [8 12 16 17 42 43 44 59 60 78 79 117 126 127 131];
Set 10:  cfg.pmu = [5 8 10 24 33 35 42 59 65 80 86 94 96 119 127];

# 533-node : 10 random placements, 50 sensors each (8.7% of 577 branches)
Set 01:  cfg.pmu = [2 9 24 37 56 69 79 85 139 147 148 154 155 165 168 178 181 212 223 254 256 257 259 260 268 277 280 281 286 343 372 376 412 430 434 452 454 455 477 479 498 499 507 512 523 537 542 549 550 576];

Set 04:  cfg.pmu = [15 27 63 84 86 102 113 114 128 132 154 158 169 172 184 204 209 216 218 245 256 263 288 291 306 334 341 348 352 364 367 390 402 403 404 427 436 459 465 485 487 492 493 519 532 537 543 550 552 576];
Set 05:  cfg.pmu = [45 56 89 104 106 128 138 142 155 159 160 163 164 192 200 216 229 230 261 267 278 280 311 318 327 345 351 358 364 376 386 396 403 406 408 447 471 491 506 514 516 521 530 543 551 556 567 570 572 577];
Set 06:  cfg.pmu = [17 26 64 74 80 82 104 107 110 116 117 123 126 142 149 166 175 183 184 186 205 208 270 271 293 300 319 356 370 380 389 404 412 421 423 433 447 467 486 489 498 511 514 522 525 536 537 541 549 574];
